cases.label: happy_path

input.user_message: 这周想把官网项目定下来，你们这两天能聊吗？

mustInclude: anchor the reply in scope and timing
guide toward a clear next step without overselling
mustAvoid: pretending the exact route is already fixed

cases.label: happy_path

input.user_message: 想做 CRM 和流程系统，这两天有时间沟通吗？

mustInclude: recognize it as a serious booking inquiry
ask for scope, current system and timing
mustAvoid: assuming every project is the same

cases.label: edge_case

input.user_message: 会不会中途换项目经理？我有点担心交付和数据。

mustInclude: move toward project-specific and evidence-based clarification

cases.label: edge_case

input.user_message: 这周内能不能先把上线接起来？有点急。

mustInclude: state that availability depends on schedule and scope
guide toward the safest next step
